name: Q2 Enterprise Risk Assessment
description: Cross-functional risk identification and mitigation planning for Q2 2024.

hasPart.text: We need a comprehensive Q2 risk register. Three areas: cyber-security, supply chain resilience, and regulatory compliance in the new APAC markets.
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CEO opens Q2 risk assessment session.

hasPart.text: Cyber-security posture: risk rating HIGH. We have three unpatched critical CVEs in the ERP stack (CVSS 9.1, 8.8, 8.3). Remediation window is 14 days. Cloud SOC coverage is 93% — target is 99%. Recommend immediate patch sprint and 24/7 SOC upgrade.

Patching the ERP will cost $280K including downtime. SOC upgrade adds $420K annually. However, the expected loss from a breach (based on our cyber insurance actuarial data) is $4.2M. Risk-adjusted NPV strongly favours remediation.
Approved. Initiate patch sprint immediately. CSO owns the remediation timeline. What's the supply chain picture?
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CEO approves remediation and pivots to supply chain.

hasPart.text: Supply chain: MEDIUM risk. Two Tier-1 suppliers in Taiwan have single-factory exposure. Dual-sourcing qualification underway for both — expected completion Q3. Buffer inventory covers 11 weeks. APAC compliance review still in progress; legal team targets completion by end of June.
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CFO summarises supply chain and compliance status.
